name: Fruta Fruta Inc.
summary: Fruta Fruta Inc. markets fruits and foods in Japan. Its products include mixed beverage, frozen puree, diet food, freeze dried powder, chocolate, sherbet, vinegar, and granola; and raw materials, such as ground pulp, condensed extracts, pulverized pulp, agroforestry cacao beans, OMEGA oil, various fruit seed oils, etc. The company sells its products through retail, wholesale, e-commerce, TV shopping, and mail-order, as well as it exports its products. Fruta Fruta Inc. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
